rulings.Case Title: ROBERT KEATING VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, January 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT FLUOR CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT and summary adjudication in the alternative is denied. Moving party failed to sustain its burden of production. Defendant did not propound special interrogatories, and Smith¿s declaration does not show that Fluor retained documents going back to 1965 or that there was always documentary evidence of the jobs that Fluor performed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAY TRELOAR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil Re Good Chevrolet
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, January 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Counsel for DEFENDANT GOOD CHEVROLET, INC.'s MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel is granted, no opposition filed. =(220/HEK)
